name: A2AC Sandbox
description: A2AC Sandbox exposes a safe public protocol surface for validating Cube envelopes, parsing Q commands, recording receipts, and registering sandbox agents. Advisory consulting available for teams evaluating AI workflows.

skills.name: Cube Validation
skills.description: Validates public Cube envelope structure for sandbox workflows.
examples: Validate this Cube envelope for structure
Check if this agent definition is well-formed

skills.name: Q Command Parse
skills.description: Parses public Q command format into domain, sequence, and outcome.
examples: Parse this Q command into domain, sequence, and outcome

skills.name: Receipt Record
skills.description: Writes a sandbox receipt event for workflow traceability.
examples: Record this workflow completion as a receipt
Get the receipt chain for this session

skills.name: Agent Register
skills.description: Registers a sandbox agent and allowed capabilities.
examples: Register a new sandbox agent with these capabilities

skills.name: Local Status
skills.description: Returns health and readiness status of the local A2AC instance.
examples: Check if local A2AC is running
Get the status of the local sandbox
